Activity log confirms 5 posts live from March 30 (Junk Removal Winners, USA Car Detailing, Pressure Washing Business Owners, Pro Window Cleaning, Window Cleaning Newbies). Messenger shows no new unread DMs. Groups active updated 16→18 based on expanded group activity log (Commercial Cleaning, PLUMBERS TALK, Roofing Contractors, HVAC, Painting, etc.). Cumulative totals unchanged: 113 comments, 38 positive, 2 DMs, 12 interest signals, 18 posts live.
